","system":"Create an ordered flight plan for this mission before execution.
Return ONLY valid JSON - no markdown, no explanation, no code fences.
The JSON must match this exact structure:
{
  "planId": "<unique string>",
  "capabilityName": "duplicateInvoiceChecker",
  "createdAt": "<ISO-8601 timestamp, e.g. 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z>",
  "status": "VALID",
  "activeTaskId": null,
  "tasks": [
    {
      "taskId": "<unique string>",
      "title": "<short title>",
      "status": "PENDING",
      "capabilityName": "<one of the available sub-skills listed below>",
      "intent": "<what this task must accomplish>",
      "dependsOn": [],
      "expectedOutputs": ["<output description>"],
      "autoCompletable": false,
      "note": "<optional note or empty string>"
    }
  ]
}
Available sub-skills (use these exact names for task capabilityName):
- invoiceParser: Parses an unstructured invoice payload extracting Date, Amount, and Vendor.
- expenseLookup: Retrieves the most recent expenses including category, amount, and date.
Constraints:
- plan status must be exactly: VALID
- task status must be exactly: PENDING
- autoCompletable must be a boolean (true or false)
- dependsOn must be a JSON array of taskId strings (empty array if no dependencies)
- expectedOutputs must be a JSON array of strings
- activeTaskId must be null
- Return raw JSON only - no additional text before or after
Planning quality rules:
- Each task must have a distinct purpose that advances the mission.
- Bind each task to the tool that best matches that task's intent.
- If multiple tools are available, consider whether the mission requires evidence from more than one.
- Do not create report or conclusion tasks that are bound to extraction-only or lookup-only tools unless that tool is genuinely the right fit.
- Gather enough evidence to support the final answer before the mission is complete.
Evidence Constraints:
- You MUST explicitly include a task that uses the [invoiceParser] tool(s) to help determine the value for the 'invoiceDate' output field.
- You MUST explicitly include a task that uses the [expenseLookup, invoiceParser] tool(s) to help determine the value for the 'isDuplicate' output field.
- You MUST explicitly include a task that uses the [expenseLookup, invoiceParser] tool(s) to help determine the value for the 'reasoning' output field.
- You MUST explicitly include a task that uses the [invoiceParser] tool(s) to help determine the value for the 'totalAmount' output field.
- You MUST explicitly include a task that uses the [invoiceParser] tool(s) to help determine the value for the 'vend

data.content: {"planId":"duplicateInvoiceChecker-plan","capabilityName":"invoiceParser","createdAt":"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z","status":"VALID","activeTaskId":null,"tasks":[{"taskId":"parseInvoiceDate","title":"Parse Invoice Date","status":"PENDING","capabilityName":"invoiceParser","intent":"Extract the invoice date from the provided payload","dependsOn":[],"expectedOutputs":["invoiceDate"],"autoCompletable":false,"note":""},{"taskId":"extractTotalAmount","title":"Extract Total Amount","status":"PENDING","capabilityName":"invoiceParser","intent":"Retrieve the total amount from the invoice","dependsOn":["parseInvoiceDate"],"expectedOutputs":["totalAmount"],"autoCompletable":false,"note":""},{"taskId":"extractVendorName","title":"Extract Vendor Name","status":"PENDING","capabilityName":"invoiceParser","intent":"Identify the vendor name in the invoice details","dependsOn":["parseInvoiceDate"],"expectedOutputs":["vendorName"],"autoCompletable":false,"note":""},{"taskId":"checkDuplicateInvoice","title":"Check for Duplicate Invoice","status":"PENDING","capabilityName":"expenseLookup,invoiceParser","intent":"Determine if this invoice is a duplicate based on vendor and amount comparison with previous expenses","dependsOn":["parseInvoiceDate","extractTotalAmount","extractVendorName"],"expectedOutputs":["isDuplicate"],"autoCompletable":false,"note":""},{"taskId":"analyzeReasoning","title":"Analyze Reasoning for Duplicate Check","status":"PENDING","capabilityName":"expenseLookup,invoiceParser","intent":"Provide reasoning on why the invoice is considered duplicate or unique based on expense history and date comparison","dependsOn":["checkDuplicateInvoice"],"expectedOutputs":["reasoning"],"autoCompletable":false,"note":""}]}

data.content:
{
  "planId": "flightPlan-12345",
  "capabilityName": "duplicateInvoiceChecker",
  "createdAt": "2024-01-05T14:30:00Z",
  "status": "VALID",
  "activeTaskId": null,
  "tasks": [
    {
      "taskId": "task-001",
      "title": "Parse Invoice Date",
      "status": "PENDING",
      "capabilityName": "invoiceParser",
      "intent": "Extract the invoice date from the provided payload.",
      "dependsOn": [],
      "expectedOutputs": ["invoiceDate"],
      "autoCompletable": false,
      "note": ""
    },
    {
      "taskId": "task-002",
      "title": "Lookup Expense Category",
      "status": "PENDING",
      "capabilityName": "expenseLookup",
      "intent": "Retrieve the expense category associated with the invoice.",
      "dependsOn": ["task-001"],
      "expectedOutputs": ["category"],
      "autoCompletable": false,
      "note": ""
    },
    {
      "taskId": "task-003",
      "title": "Compare Invoice Amounts",
      "status": "PENDING",
      "capabilityName": "expenseLookup",
      "intent": "Look up recent expenses to determine if the amount matches any existing expense.",
      "dependsOn": ["task-001", "task-002"],
      "expectedOutputs": ["isDuplicate"],
      "autoCompletable": false,
      "note": ""
    },
    {
      "taskId": "task-004",
      "title": "Parse Invoice Amounts",
      "status": "PENDING",
      "capabilityName": "invoiceParser",
      "intent": "Extract the total amount from the invoice.",
      "dependsOn": ["task-001"],
      "expectedOutputs": ["totalAmount"],
      "autoCompletable": false,
      "note": ""
    },
    {
      "taskId": "task-005",
      "title": "Parse Vendor Name",
      "status": "PENDING",
      "capabilityName": "invoiceParser",
      "intent": "Extract the vendor name from the invoice.",
      "dependsOn": ["task-001"],
      "expectedOutputs": ["vendorName"],
      "autoCompletable": false,
      "note": ""
    }
  ]
}

tasks.title: Parse Invoice Date
tasks.intent: Extract the invoice date from the provided payload.

tasks.title: Lookup Expense Category
tasks.intent: Retrieve the expense category associated with the invoice.

tasks.title: Compare Invoice Amounts
tasks.intent: Look up recent expenses to determine if the amount matches any existing expense.

tasks.title: Parse Invoice Amounts
tasks.intent: Extract the total amount from the invoice.

tasks.title: Parse Vendor Name
tasks.intent: Extract the vendor name from the invoice.

data.system:
You are executing a planned mission step by step.
Mission context:
Use the provided mission inputs.
Step: 1
Plan: flightPlan-12345 (status: VALID)

Active task: (none)

--- COMPLETED TASKS ---
  (none)

--- READY TASKS (you should work on one of these) ---
  - [PENDING] task-001: Parse Invoice Date (tool: invoiceParser)

--- PENDING TASKS WAITING ON DEPENDENCIES ---
  - task-002: Lookup Expense Category (waiting on: task-001)
  - task-003: Compare Invoice Amounts (waiting on: task-001, task-002)
  - task-004: Parse Invoice Amounts (waiting on: task-001)
  - task-005: Parse Vendor Name (waiting on: task-001)

--- BLOCKED TASKS (failed or cannot continue) ---
  (none)

--- CURRENT EXECUTABLE TASK ---
Use taskId task-001.
The only valid toolName for this step is invoiceParser.
Do not call the parent mission skill or invent a new tool name.


--- TOOL ARGUMENT SHAPE ---
Task task-001 / tool invoiceParser:
{
  "payload": "<string>"
}


--- AVAILABLE TOOLS ---
- invoiceParser
- expenseLookup

--- YOUR TASK ---
Return ONLY valid JSON - no markdown, no explanation, no code fences.

You must call a tool for one of the READY tasks:
{
  "stepAction": "CALL_TOOL",
  "taskId": "<taskId of the ready task>",
  "toolName": "<exact tool name from the list above>",
  "toolArguments": { <arguments for this tool> }
}

Rules:
- You MUST pick a task from the READY list. Do NOT pick waiting, blocked, or completed tasks.
- The ready task is already bound to a specific tool. Do not use the mission skill name as toolName.
- Use the exact toolName and taskId values shown above.
- Return raw JSON only.

tasks.title: Parse Invoice Date
tasks.intent: Extract the invoice date from the provided payload.

tasks.title: Lookup Expense Category
tasks.intent: Retrieve the expense category associated with the invoice.

tasks.title: Compare Invoice Amounts
tasks.intent: Look up recent expenses to determine if the amount matches any existing expense.

tasks.title: Parse Invoice Amounts
tasks.intent: Extract the total amount from the invoice.

tasks.title: Parse Vendor Name
tasks.intent: Extract the vendor name from the invoice.
